Programs

Construction Technology

MENU

Since the construction sector acts as a locomotive in all economies, it is always a focal sector where significant incentives and investments are inevitable. Therefore, the construction sector will play an active role in employment growth. For this purpose, the main aim of the Construction Technology program is to train our program graduates as technical staff who are actively involved in the construction of dams, roads, airports, housing, etc., who can work in the natural resources, transportation-highway, building departments and material testing laboratories of public or local governments.

Our graduates can work in housing construction, factory construction, shopping center construction, road, dam, tunnel, airport, port, water transmission lines, sports facilities construction, supervision units of official government offices, supervision units of local governments, private supervision units, construction departments and project offices of all public or private institutions.

Period of Education:

2 Years

English Prep School:

Optional

Type of Education:

Formal Education

Programme Campus:

Tuzla Campus

Internship:

Optional
